BRA | MID211: Midnight Apartments

Your Check-In Guide

Address 211/1 Elouera Street, Braddon ACT 2612
Building Midnight Apartments
Apartment Unit 211, Level 2
Parking Level −3 — Bay 211
Need Help? 0493 173 122
📞 Lost or need help? Call 0493 173 122

🏢 Getting to Your Apartment

Midnight Apartments — Unit 211, Level 2

🔑
Keys Required Before Proceeding
You should have already collected your keys from 23 Lonsdale Street, Braddon before going to the property. If you don't have your keys yet, tap here for key collection instructions or call us on 0493 173 122.
⚠️ Please note: Midnight hotel reception cannot assist with apartment access. If you need help at any point, call us on 0493 173 122.
Step 1
Enter the Building Foyer
Enter through the main foyer doors on Elouera Street. Once inside, head to the lifts on the LEFT of the letterboxes — follow the arrow.
Step 2
Take the Residential Lifts to Level 2
Use the Residential Lifts Only — marked with the Midnight sign. Do not use the hotel lifts. Swipe your remote on the reader, then press Level 2.
Step 3
Find Apartment 211
Exit on Level 2. Turn left and walk to the end of the corridor, then take the first right down the hallway until you find Room 211.
Step 1
Carpark Entry — Corner of Mort Street
The carpark entrance is on the corner of Mort Street. Drive in — the arrow shows the entry point.
Step 2
Open the Boom Gate
Press the button on your remote to open the boom gate and drive through. The same remote opens all gates and doors throughout the carpark.
Step 3
Down Ramp 1 — Turn Left, Then Open Roller Door
Go to the bottom of the first ramp and turn LEFT. You will see a roller door — use your remote to open it. Continue all the way down to Level −3, turning left at each ramp until you reach the very bottom.
Step 4
Down Ramp 3 — Turn Left to Bay 211
At the bottom of ramp 3, turn LEFT. Car space 211 is immediately on the left-hand side — look for 211 marked on the floor.
Step 5
Take the Residential Lift to Level 2
After parking, the apartment lifts are through the glass doors on the right-hand side. Use the Residential Lifts Only — swipe your remote to call the lift to Level −3, then press Level 2.
Step 6
Find Apartment 211
Exit on Level 2. Turn left and walk to the end of the corridor, then take the first right down the hallway until you find Room 211.
⚠️ Having trouble? Call us on 0493 173 122 — we respond within minutes. Midnight hotel reception cannot assist with apartment access.
